Aligned claude-spawn send-keys to delayed one-command pattern matching tmux skill

Forked 20 source files + bun-polyfill.cjs into src/core/, 21 test files + fixtures into src/core/test/. Created src/ns/, src/ns/test/, src/ns/utils/, src/playwright/ directories. Fixed test imports (../src/ → ../). Removed 3 gstack-specific tests (compare-board, gstack-config, gstack-update-check). Added .gitignore for dist/node_modules.

Created package.json with deps (diff, playwright). Build compiles: bun build --compile src/core/cli.ts --outfile dist/browse (100ms). Updated all import paths for src/core/ layout. Binary name 'browse', runs with correct branding.

Updated config.ts: .gstack/ → .steez/ for project-local state, added globalDir (~/.steez/browse/) for cross-project data. Migrated all 20+ source files from .gstack to .steez references. Kept gstack extension paths as fallback (shared extension).

Created src/ns/ns-commands.ts with handleNsCommand dispatcher + stubs for all 8 NS commands. Wired into server.ts dispatch and commands.ts registry. NS commands dispatch via 'ns <subcommand>' pattern.
Created src/playwright/tracing.ts. tracing-start wraps context.tracing.start(), tracing-stop saves trace zip to ~/.steez/browse/traces/. Registered in commands.ts + server.ts.
Created src/playwright/routing.ts. route/unroute/route-list wrap page.route() with abort/fulfill/continue actions. Tracks active routes in memory.

Created src/playwright/video.ts. video-start recreates context with recordVideo, video-stop finalizes and returns path. Added getContext(), recreateContextWithVideo(), stopVideoRecording() to BrowserManager.
